_cite.reason: Span re-point (item 3): fact_span_not_in_source FACT whose span is verbatim in another pool source — re-point search_result_id/source_id/tier to the source that contains it. Deterministic, no LLM. Operator ruling 2026-07-04.

prior.claim_text: [effective_date] AFIR Regulation 2023/1804 was published in the EU Official Journal on 22 September 2023. It entered into force on 12 October 2023.
prior.source_span: AFIR Regulation 2023/1804 was published in the EU Official Journal on 22 September 2023. It entered into force on 12 October 2023.
